# YMU — YimMenuUpdater

> YMU is a modern, source-available Windows launcher for YimMenu, a mod menu for Grand Theft Auto V. It downloads and SHA-256-verifies the latest YimMenu (Legacy) and YimMenuV2 (Enhanced) DLLs, injects them into GTA V, and manages Lua scripts from a clean desktop app.

YMU is free and open source. It supports both GTA V editions (Legacy and Enhanced), custom install paths and custom DLLs, automatic update checks, a Lua script manager, 12 UI languages, and light/dark themes. The website (ymu.pages.dev) is a localized landing page; the app itself and its releases live on GitHub.

## Site

- [Home / language selection](https://ymu.pages.dev/): choose a language.
- [Main site (English)](https://ymu.pages.dev/en/): features, how-to, download, changelog, and FAQ.

## Project

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/NiiV3AU/YMU): full source code, issues, and documentation.
- [Latest release](https://github.com/NiiV3AU/YMU/releases/latest): download the newest YMU.exe.

## Related projects

- [YimMenu (Legacy)](https://github.com/Mr-X-GTA/YimMenu): the GTA V Legacy mod menu that YMU installs and updates.
- [YimMenuV2 (Enhanced)](https://github.com/YimMenu/YimMenuV2): the GTA V Enhanced mod menu that YMU installs and updates.
